title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Ceva Logistics India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Ceva Logistics India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ceva Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ceva Logistics India:
Ceva Logistics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ceva Logistics India!
